name: PT Bank Aladin Syariah Tbk
summary: PT Bank Net Indonesia Syariah provides sharia banking products and services for corporate and commercial customers in Indonesia. Its products and services include current, savings, and restricted profit-sharing investment accounts, as well as time deposits; and term, revolving, overdraft, and syndicated financing products. The company also provides trade finance products and services, such as letter of credit, import and export financing, inward and outward documentary collection, bank guarantee, and LC/SKBDN usance payable at sight. Its financing products and services also cover project, contract, asset acquisition and investment, refinancing, and working capital financing. PT Bank Net Indonesia Syariah was formerly known as PT Bank Maybank Syariah Indonesia and changed its name to PT Bank Net Indonesia Syariah in December 2019. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia. PT Bank Net Indonesia Syariah is a subsidiary of PT NTI Global Indonesia.
